title: melicope elleryana
intro: Melicope elleryana, also known as Yellow Jasmine or Queensland Yellow Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of anxiety and insomnia. The leaves and flowers of the Melicope elleryana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and are often used in herbal preparations to promote overall well-being.
